◎简　　介  

　　The strongest theme in Dekh Magar Pyaar Say is it's avant-garde look and a strong, imaginative storyline, anchored in a quirky and amusingly observed reality. It takes place in an idealized version of the world. Lahore, the cultural capital of Pakistan provides the setting for a light, elegant yet complex romance, which includes elements of fantasy with all the negative element...
